input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.2.2
            TITLE: bodywork, a nose cone, or another component mounted to the vehicle is an aerodynamic

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.2.2: Bodywork, a nose cone, or another component mounted to the vehicle is an Aerodynamic
T.7.2.2 Bodywork, a nose cone, or another component mounted to the vehicle is an Aerodynamic 
Device if is designed to, or may possibly, produce force due to aerodynamic effects

final_answer: Bodywork, a nose cone, or another component mounted to the vehicle is an Aerodynamic Device if is designed to, or may possibly, produce force due to aerodynamic effects
